name: Professional Base Knowledge Pack
description: Baseline professional knowledge shipped with LocalAIFactory. v1 covers software engineering, CRUD-over-MSSQL, databases, Python/AI/RAG, security, governance, control-style standards, finance/accounting/banking, operations, product/admin patterns, and reporting. v1.2 extends into enterprise advisory and domain intelligence: financial market prediction & quantitative analysis, accounting standards & financial reporting, the Mauritius banking & financial-services context, payments/transfers/settlement/reconciliation, leasing/lending/credit/arrears, insurance & financial-services controls, cheque OCR & signature-forgery/document-fraud, Python OCR & computer-vision deployment, PDF reading/classification/summarization, source-attributed AI/coding/business research notes, and enterprise solution-solving playbooks. All items are original summaries with explicit limitation notes; research- and standards-derived items are attributed via the source registry.
license: Original professional summaries and practical patterns authored for LocalAIFactory. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No third-party source is vendored or reproduced verbatim.
legalLimitations: This pack contains ORIGINAL practical summaries only. It does NOT reproduce ISO/IEC, IFRS, PMBOK, FATF, Basel, regulatory, or any other proprietary/official text verbatim, and it does not assert official certification or compliance. Governance, accounting and control-style items are practical summaries, not substitutes for the licensed standards or for formal legal, regulatory, tax, audit, or compliance advice. Mauritius banking/financial-services items are awareness-level only and are not Bank of Mauritius / FSC / FIU / Data Protection Office guidance or a compliance claim. Financial-market items are analytical only and are NOT financial or investment advice; no profitability or guaranteed outcome is implied. Cheque OCR / signature-forgery / document-fraud items never assert automatic fraud proof or legally conclusive forgery detection; high-risk decisions require human review, recorded confidence and evidence, and detection is separated from verification. OCR/computer-vision accuracy is dataset- and pipeline-dependent and no fixed accuracy is claimed; 2D document scanning is distinct from 3D/medical imaging and nothing here is medical diagnosis. PDF summaries must retain provenance and distinguish extracted text from model output. Research-derived items are attributed to registered source families, not specific peer-reviewed papers; no DOIs/titles/authors are asserted and such attributions require verification before formal citation.
sourcePolicy: Original professional summaries and practical patterns only. No proprietary/official text copied verbatim. Sources are registered in source-registry.json for governance and attribution; research families are marked 'verification required'. Every item carries an explicit limitation note and a confidence score.
